headline: Earnings Preview: MGE (MGEE) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: MGE (MGEE) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Morgan Stanley Updates Utility Outlook, Lowers View on Edison International (EIX)
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.10%, Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 21, Morgan Stanley lowered its price target on Edison International (NYSE:EIX) to $70 from $71. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The firm said it is updating price targets […]
